meaning: adj.缺乏声调的,单调的,沉闷的,无声的,哑的
examples: Then you warn't a dream, after all, " he said, in his flat toneless voice."
I dislike the black clothing that my sister bought for me. I really don't like the toneless colors.
Imagine a world where flowers would not exist: it would be really toneless and sad, don't you agree?
Up here at Gillette Stadium, the Patriots are cool, flat with their emotion and toneless in their public moments.
